chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Civil Transfer App. No. S – 08 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection No.1 at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of CMA No.708/2023 (Stay) 09.10.2023 Mr. Mehboob Ali Wassan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for applicant. No intimation is received. Accordingly, this transfer application is dismissed for non- prosecution along with listed application. J U D G E Abdul Basit
